case_title: 1200 CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. FLOWERS CLAIR MARIE INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2011 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT. CLERK: A. PASCUAL . NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1200 CALIFORNIA CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FLOWERS CLAIR MARIE INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
